releases.title: Audiobook: Ongoing Work of the Holy Spirit

releases.description: Hopscotch Hermeneutic is a lighthearted pop-prophecy satire inspired by decades of charts, timelines, headlines, blood moons, barcodes, and end-times speculation.

releases.description: More Like You is a joyful anthem of spiritual growth inspired by the lives of Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.

releases.title: The Tree of Life

releases.title: Yo Way!

releases.title: AudioBook: When The City Fell: Matthew 24
releases.description: WHEN THE CITY FELL A Historical Fiction Audiobook of the Days Before Jerusalem Fell By Terry Kashian Jerusalem still stood.

releases.title: The Bride Adorn & Lovely
releases.description: The Bride Adorned and Lovely is a joyful celebration of God's eternal purpose revealed in Christ and expressed through His people.

releases.title: Splendid City Life
releases.description: "Splendid City Life" is a joyful celebration of God's holy city as a present spiritual reality experienced by His people today.

releases.title: Audiobook:The Full Purpose of the Millennium
A Vision for a Nation
releases.description: A Vision for a Nation is a cinematic anthem and prayer for national renewal inspired by the timeless truths of Scripture.

releases.description: "The Theosphere" is a worship journey through three simple prayers: Fill us.

releases.title: The Heavenly Vision: Two Portals
releases.description: The Heavenly Vision (Two Portals) What do Jeremiah's Potter's House and Ezekiel's River Chebar have in common?

releases.title: The Anchor of Our Souls
releases.description: The Anchor of Our Souls Life has a way of pulling us in every direction.

releases.title: A Pile of Stones is not a Building

releases.description: The Legend of Don Crump is a lighthearted tribute to a friend who proves that passion never grows old.

releases.title: The Holy City
releases.description: “The Holy City” is a cinematic worship journey into the realized New Creation revealed in Revelation 21 and 22.

releases.title: I Am A Witness
releases.description: “I Am a Witness” is a song about the moment everything changes when Christ calls your name.

releases.title: The Portal Now Abides
releases.description: “The Portal Now Abides” is a deeply experiential song about the unveiling of Christ within us as the true meeting place of Heaven and Earth.

releases.title: The Cross and Fire

releases.description: 《我的画像》 My Portrait 这首歌讲述了一段从骄傲、自我挣扎，到完全交托与更新的旅程。 This song tells the journey from pride and self striving to surrender, restoration, and transformation.

releases.title: I Am A Worm - Country Style 1980's
releases.description: This is the same words of my other song but in a 1980's country music style.

releases.description: “My Portrait” is a song about the exhausting struggle of trying to paint our own lives through self effort, self image, ambition, fear, and striving.

releases.description: “We See Jesus” is a song about Christ revealed through His people, the power of the second birth, and the glory of His indwelling life.

releases.description: Surrender is More - This song is a map of the journey from the exhaustion of self-sufficiency to the expansive peace of yielding.

releases.description: “The Lord Is There” is a journey through the inward work of Christ and the unveiling of His life within a people.

releases.title: Glory, Glory A Pool Shootin' Story

releases.title: A Christmas Miracle: He Came For Us All
El Reino Esta Aqui - The Kingdom is Here
The Inner Story
releases.description: The Inner Story Every life tells a story. The real question is: Who is writing it? The Inner Story is a journey through the pages of a life transformed by the Author of life Himself. From the first seeds planted in our hearts to the wisdom gained through decades of joy, sorrow, victories, and failures, God is faithfully writing a story that reveals His own character. The song reminds us that many voices compete to w…

releases.title: From the Stone to the Throne
releases.description: From the Stone to the Throne Salvation is not the finish line—it is the doorway into God's eternal purpose. From the Stone to the Throne follows the believer's journey from first encountering Jesus, the Living Stone, to being built together with His people into God's dwelling place and a royal priesthood. Inspired by passages such as 1 Peter 2, Ephesians 2, Hebrews 3, and Revelation, this song celebrates Christ's on…

releases.title: యేసు సహాయం యొక్క రాయి
releases.description: Jesus Is Our Stone of Help: This Telugu recording is lovingly dedicated to my longtime friend and beloved brother in Christ, Gummadi Ebenezer. For many years, his friendship, encouragement, and faithful service to the Lord have been a great blessing to me. I am especially grateful for his help in bringing this song into the Telugu language so that it may encourage and strengthen believers throughout India. The title…

releases.title: Two Balloons
releases.description: Two Balloons

releases.title: It's You in Me
releases.description: It's You in Me For years I believed the Christian life was about climbing—trying harder, reaching higher, becoming better through determination and discipline. I knew about God's grace, but I had not yet discovered its reality. This song tells the story of a life-changing realization: Christ was never asking me to climb to Him. He had already come to live in me. As that truth became real, striving slowly gave way to…

releases.title: Two Colts
releases.description: Two Colts What if the greatest battle in life isn't between good and evil—but between self-will and surrender? Two Colts is a cinematic allegory about two young colts standing at the same crossroads. One believes freedom means answering to no one. The other entrusts himself to the Trainer, discovering that discipline, grace, and wisdom prepare him for the King's purpose. Inspired by the biblical themes of Titus 2, w…

releases.title: Hokey Pokey Prophecy
releases.description: A Personal Word Thank you for listening to *Hokey Pokey Prophecy. If you smiled, then the song has done part of its work. For many years I've watched believers become captivated by predictions, timelines, charts, and the latest interpretation of world events. Every generation seems convinced that it alone has finally solved the mystery. Yet the fascination often leaves us talking more about prophecy than about the O…

releases.title: No More Curse
releases.description: No More Curse is inspired by the architecture of the New Creation, tracing the beautiful transition from the dust of old covenant ruins to the glorious city of God. It is the story of humanity’s raw, precious stones being raised by the Second Man and fit perfectly together into a coordinated, mature kingdom of praise. Through the imagery of wandering birds, the legal finality of the cross, and the power of eulogia,…

releases.title: Mighty Men
releases.description: **Mighty Men**

releases.title: The Lantern: One Word At A Time
releases.description: The Lantern : One Word at a Time What if God doesn't give us a map because He desires something far greater than certainty? The Lantern was inspired by the moment Jesus spoke a single word to Peter: "Come." Peter wasn't given an explanation, a guarantee, or a detailed plan. He was given one word—and that one word invited him beyond the safety of the boat into a supernatural life sustained by Christ Himself. As I wro…

releases.title: The Seed Became the Sound
releases.description: **The Seed Became the Sound** was inspired by the remarkable events recorded in **Luke chapter 1**. If you're not already familiar with that chapter, some of the imagery in this song may seem unusual at first. That is intentional. The lyrics follow the unfolding story of Zechariah and Elizabeth, the promise of John the Baptist, and the hidden work of God before His purposes become visible.

releases.title: Two Altars
releases.description: Two Altars is inspired by the beautiful pilgrimage of Psalm 84, where the sparrow finds a home and the swallow builds her nest beside God's altars. It is the story of every restless heart that longs for more than forgiveness—it longs for God's presence. Through the imagery of the swallow, the sparrow, the two altars, and the pilgrim's journey, this song traces the path from surrender to communion, from the altar of…

releases.title: Come Home
releases.description: **Come Home** was inspired by the beautiful imagery of Psalm 84, where the sparrow finds a home and the swallow builds her nest beside God's altars. Their restless search comes to an end, not because they found a place, but because they found His presence among His people.

releases.title: O the Riches
releases.description: O the Riches is a joyful celebration of God's fulfilled promise in Jesus Christ. Beginning with Abraham and the promised Seed, this song traces God's unfolding purpose through the cross, the resurrection, and the gift of His life within His people. It reminds us that we are not merely forgiven—we are co-heirs with Christ, sharing in His unsearchable riches and expressing His life together. This song is an invitation…
